channel.title: ideas on Xing Lin
channel.description: Recent content in ideas on Xing Lin

item.title: Idea Repository
item.description: List of ideas to explore. Interaction between a filesystem and a computational SSD that does transparent compression. Problem: How to manage SSD space in this case? What API should be use? Can use SSDSim to explore the design space. Key prefix compression in k/v store Problem: in levelDB, it uses fixed-size key prefix compression. Can we do better than this? In Rockset/Foundationdb, secondary indexes are stored as <key, null> key/value pairs.
